title: Latest Viral TikTok Riddles (Brand New)
licenseNote: Starter questions are bundled for local video generation. Buyers can edit, replace, or extend this JSON file.

items.question: What belongs to you, but other people use it more than you do?
items.explanation: Other people say your name more often than you do.

items.question: A girl deletes a message and everyone in the room knows exactly what it said. Why?
items.answer: It was projected on a screen
items.explanation: The message was visible to everyone before deletion.

items.question: A phone rings in a silent room, but no phone exists there. What rang?
items.explanation: The ringing came from audio playing in a clip.

items.question: What gets bigger the more you take away from it?
items.explanation: Removing material makes a hole larger.

items.question: A picture shows rain, but nothing in the picture is wet. Why?
items.answer: It is a weather app icon
items.explanation: The rain is symbolic, not physical rain.

items.question: You see a phone at 1% battery, but it never turns off. Why?
items.explanation: A phone inside a photo does not use battery.
items.hint: Look for the phone trap clue.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: A person texts 'I am asleep.' What is the obvious problem?
items.explanation: They had to be awake to send the text.
items.hint: Look for the text message clue.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: You look in the mirror and see the word 'AMBULANCE' correctly. Where are you?
items.explanation: The word is reversed on the vehicle so drivers read it correctly in mirrors.
items.hint: Look for the mirror clue clue.
items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: A room has no doors and no windows. How do you get out?
items.explanation: The room exists only in the riddle.

items.engagementQuestion: Did you get it before the reveal?

items.question: What gets more likes the less real it is?
items.explanation: Filters can make images look better while reducing reality.

items.question: Your friend says they never lie, then says 'I am lying now.' What is this?
items.explanation: The sentence contradicts itself either way.

items.question: Which word becomes shorter when you add two letters to it?
items.explanation: Adding the letters E and R turns short into shorter.

items.question: What can you catch but never throw?
items.explanation: You can catch a cold, but you cannot throw one.

items.question: What has thirteen hearts but no other organs?
items.explanation: A standard deck includes thirteen cards in the heart suit.

items.question: What has a head and a tail but no body?
items.explanation: A coin has a head side and a tail side but no body.
